summary: Test suite has broken execution paths and incomplete setup. Critical issues: (1) tests/artifact-cleanup.bats uses SCRIPT="./artifact-cleanup.sh" but file is in parent directory, needs ../artifact-cleanup.sh; (2) fixture files (basic.csv, max-age.csv, etc.) referenced but not provided—tests cannot run; (3) paths to fixtures assume they're in tests/ dir but are copied to repo root; (4) assertions brittle—check for exact string presence (e.g., 'Space reclaimed: 7000000 bytes') rather than parsing output, breaking on format changes; (5) act integration test checks for 'ok 1', 'ok 5', 'ok 10', 'ok 15' line numbers, fragile if tests added/removed; (6) missing edge cases—no tests for invalid date formats, non-numeric parameters, CSV parsing errors, timezone handling, numeric overflow, zero/negative values; (7) no per-test setup/teardown for isolation; (8) run_act_test() helper is complex and could fail silently. Coverage attempts all three policies and error cases but fixture gaps prevent verification. Would not catch regressions reliably due to brittleness and incomplete setup.
